items.title: Reactor vessel installed at Lufeng unit 1
items.blurb: The reactor pressure vessel has been installed at unit 1 of the Lufeng nuclear power plant in China's Guangdong province, China General Nuclear announced.

items.title: These Nuclear Energy Stocks Slumped in the First Half of 2026. Buy This 1 On the Dip.
items.blurb: Investors have an opportunity to buy the dip in a top nuclear industry stock.

items.title: NRC approves TerraPower construction permit
items.blurb: Today, the Nuclear Regulatory Commission announced that it has approved TerraPower’s construction permit application for Kemmerer Unit 1, the company’s first deployment of Natrium, its flagship sodium fast

items.title: Building new Swiss nuclear power plant economically viable, report says
items.blurb: The construction of a new nuclear power plant in Switzerland would be economically viable, according to a study carried out by the BAK Economics research institute on behalf of the Swiss business federation…

items.title: Nuclear Fuel Producer Finds Excellent Uranium Potential in Texas
items.blurb: Uranium Energy Corp. (UEC:NYSE AMERICAN) advances major uranium growth across Texas and Wyoming, with Burke Hollow now operating and US$818M in liquid assets fueling expansion.

items.title: Korea-US-Japan SMR project seen as strategic alliance to keep China, Russia from dominating nuclear energy exports
items.blurb: Seoul also sees the potential for cooperation in this area to clear obstacles in ongoing negotiations with Washington about uranium enrichment and reprocessing
